reviews.comment:
Servicio eficiente con servicio de chequeo de aire en las ruedas ,gratuito.  Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Efficient service with free tire pressure check. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero carece de cobros con QR.

(Translated by Google)
Good service but lacks QR code payment options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkQmJEVnlRVXRXTTJobFNFRmFXbVp4YWxsMVEzYxAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños sucios, raro en un ACA, como justificativo están reparando y no funciona el Full

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are dirty, which is unusual for an ACA; the excuse given is that they are being repaired, and the full service is not working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201MFprbEtlVkZOV21KMFVWaDFWWGxXVkU0dFoyYxAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio completa aunque ofrece servicios gratuitos o con descuento solo a socios del ACA

(Translated by Google)
It's a full-service station, although it only offers free or discounted services to ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214SVFVMDRiR3hSZFVKbFJYbHZkMk5tZERadmFtYxAB

reviews.comment:
No tiene modo.. la nafta es carisima... un espanto de servicio... desde bsas carguen en lujan.... salteen esta estacion

(Translated by Google)
There's no way around it... the gas is ridiculously expensive... the service is awful... from Buenos Aires, fill up in Luján... skip this station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xdmNtVlFVemxrYVZoYVdscFdRbTV1T1Y5RVZrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es una estación normal, ya no hay cafetería.

(Translated by Google)
It's a normal station, there's no cafeteria anymore.

reviews.comment:
Paramos y compramos empanadas y tartas
Muy rico todo!!!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped and bought empanadas and tarts. Everything was delicious!

reviews.comment:
Está en reparación, además el playero no te ofrece ni limpiarle el parabrisas aún siendo socio del automóvil club, a mejorar muchachos, no cuesta nada

(Translated by Google)
It's under repair, and the attendant won't even offer to clean your windshield even if you're a member of the automobile club. You guys need to improve; it doesn't cost anything.

reviews.comment:
Son algo lento en la atención los playeros, se toman su tiempo con toda la paciencia del año incluida
Los baños están bastante sucios y no hay full

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are a bit slow, taking their time with all the patience in the world. The restrooms are quite dirty and there's no overflow.
